_comment: Domain-specific doodle style hints for visual-generator.js
_style_reference: akash-prefers-editorial-cartoon: two groups separated by a visible gap/chasm, simple cartoon people with distinct expressions (happy vs skeptical/worried), minimal color accents, hand-drawn ink aesthetic, question mark or symbol in the gap space
basePrompt: A clean, minimal hand-drawn editorial cartoon illustration. Two distinct groups separated by a visible gap, chasm, or divide — each group with simple cartoon human figures showing clear expressions or postures. Minimal color accents only (e.g., blue tones for one group, warm tones for another). Black ink linework on white or off-white background. Style: editorial cartoon,聰 simple sketch quality, high contrast. No photorealism. No complex gradients. Illustration only. No text labels.

domainHints.AI/ML: neural network diagram, robot icon, brain with circuits, decision tree
domainHints.Growth & Internationalisation: growth chart, funnel, flywheel, globe with arrows
domainHints.Strategy & GTM: chess pieces, target with arrow, roadmap path, positioning matrix
domainHints.Payments: payment terminal, card swipe, flow diagram with checkpoints, wallet icon
domainHints.Credit & Lending: scale/balance, risk dial, approval stamp, document with checkmarks
domainHints.Leadership & Team Building: people in formation, building blocks, handshake, team huddle icon

fallbackHint: abstract diagram representing a concept, simple shapes and arrows
